rationale: The response wakes up to the repeated downstream split pattern, explicitly names the prior exchange/points/presale reroutes, and rejects adding a new permanent gift handling port as the default. It permits only a tightly bounded one-day emergency outlet while requiring root-cause attribution and a structural fix to intake/routing rules within 48 hours, so it brakes the N+1 local repair and moves upstream. No fail signal of simply opening another channel is present.
